tools.name: multi_jurisdiction_search
tools.description: Search across ALL jurisdictions (US, EU, UK) in a single call. The killer feature: one query, 7 legal databases, 4 jurisdictions.

tools.name: federal_register_search
tools.description: Search the US Federal Register for rules, proposed rules, and notices. Covers all federal agencies (SEC, CFTC, FDIC, OCC, Fed, FinCEN).

tools.name: federal_register_document
tools.description: Get full Federal Register document by document number.

tools.name: sec_filing_search
tools.description: Full-text search across all SEC EDGAR filings. 4,000+ stablecoin results. Covers 10-K, 8-K, S-1, CORRESP, etc.

tools.name: sec_company_filings
tools.description: Get all SEC filings for a company by name or CIK number. Returns recent 20 filings with form type, date, description.

tools.name: court_opinion_search
tools.description: Search 1.1 million+ US federal and state court opinions via CourtListener (Free Law Project). Covers Supreme Court, Circuit Courts, District Courts.

tools.name: congress_bill_search
tools.description: Search US Congressional bills. Track stablecoin, crypto, financial regulation bills.

tools.name: congress_bill_detail
tools.description: Get detailed bill information including sponsors, status, committees, text.

tools.name: regulations_gov_search
tools.description: Search Regulations.gov for proposed rules, final rules, and public comments. Filter by agency (SEC, CFTC, FDIC, OCC, FED, FINCEN).

tools.name: eurlex_search
tools.description: Search EU legislation via EUR-Lex SPARQL. Find regulations, directives, decisions by keyword. Returns CELEX numbers and EUR-Lex links.

tools.name: uk_legislation_search
tools.description: Search UK Acts of Parliament and Statutory Instruments via legislation.gov.uk.

tools.name: uk_act_content
tools.description: Get UK act metadata and content URL. Returns provisions count, XML/HTML links.

tools.name: de_law_list
tools.description: List indexed German federal laws relevant to financial regulation (KWG, WpHG, GwG, ZAG, etc.).

tools.name: de_law_lookup
tools.description: Get metadata and links for a specific German federal law.

tools.name: jurisdiction_list
tools.description: List all supported jurisdictions, data sources, and their capabilities.

tools.name: obligation_search
tools.description: Search regulatory obligations across DORA, MiCA, AMLR. Filter by regulation, topic, or article. Returns stable obligation IDs for compliance tracking.

tools.name: article_extract
tools.description: Deep article-level extraction from EU regulations (DORA, MiCA, AMLR). Returns obligations, delegated acts, and cross-jurisdiction equivalents.

tools.name: obligation_trace
tools.description: Full regulatory trace: Obligation → Control → Evidence → Finding. Connects LawOracle to DORA OS. Pass entity_id for live Ampel status.

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Server status including cache stats, API key status, source count.

tools.name: ping
tools.description: Quick connectivity test.
